name: Orange Sherbet Jello
recipeIngredient: 1 small can of mandarin oranges, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Jello by dissolving it in boiling water and juice from the pineapple to make 1 cup of liquid.
2. Add orange sherbet, 7 UP, and mandarin oranges to the Jello mixture.
3. Top with marshmallows.
4. Refrigerate until set.
